utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: I left a bra drying on the shower rod , you do not think your son will think it is yours and be horribly traumatised ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_I left a bra drying on the shower rod , you do not think your son will think it is yours and be horribly traumatised ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , if mommy can have a wife , daddy can have a bra .

utterances.text: Ohh , it is time to go .

utterances.text: Oh , no ... no ... no , see , that ... that clock a little fast , uh , we have 17 minutes .

utterances.text: Huh , what can we do in 17 minutes ?
